query.sql: SELECT 'Purchasing' as stage, COUNT(*) as value FROM erp_purchase_orders WHERE status NOT IN ('Cancelled', 'Draft') UNION ALL SELECT 'Production', COUNT(*) FROM erp_work_orders WHERE status NOT IN ('Scheduled') UNION ALL SELECT 'Sales', COUNT(*) FROM erp_sales_orders WHERE status NOT IN ('Cancelled', 'Draft') UNION ALL SELECT 'Shipped', COUNT(*) FROM erp_sales_orders WHERE status IN ('Shipped', 'Delivered')

option.raw: const data = (() => { const raw = ctx.data; if (Array.isArray(raw)) return raw; if (raw && Array.isArray(raw.objects)) return raw.objects; if (raw && Array.isArray(raw.data)) return raw.data; return []; })(); if (data.length === 0) { return { title: { text: 'No Data', left: 'center', top: 'center', textStyle: { color: '#999', fontSize: 14 } } }; } const order = ['Purchasing', 'Production', 'Sales', 'Shipped']; const sorted = order.map(s => { const found = data.find(d => d.stage === s); return { name: s, value: found ? parseInt(found.value) || 0 : 0 }; }); return { title: { text: 'Order Funnel', left: 'center', textStyle: { fontSize: 14 } }, tooltip: { trigger: 'item', formatter: '{b}: {c}' }, series: [{ type: 'funnel', left: '10%', top: 50, bottom: 20, width: '80%', sort: 'none', gap: 2, label: { show: true, position: 'inside', formatter: '{b}\n{c}' }, itemStyle: { borderWidth: 1, borderColor: '#fff' }, data: sorted, color: ['#f59e0b', '#10b981', '#3b82f6', '#8b5cf6'] }] };
